hero.title: Equipment built and sourced for institutional reliability.
hero.description: PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems from Mumbai, supported by partner medical technologies from global and Indian brands. Specified, installed, and supported by one technical team.

manufacturing.title: PEIC Sterilization Systems
manufacturing.description: Engineered and assembled at PEIC's Shamroz Industrial Estate facility cluster in Goregaon West, with direct OEM accountability from pressure vessel to commissioning.
manufacturing.advantages_subtitle: Sterilization equipment is not treated as a commodity purchase. PEIC keeps engineering, spares, documentation, and service ownership close to the source.

advantages.title: In-House Engineering
advantages.description: Design, production, inspection, and service feedback handled through PEIC's Mumbai manufacturing base.

advantages.title: BIS-Certified Since 1976
advantages.description: IS 3829 Part 1 and Part 2 certification history across PEIC's primary sterilizer categories.

advantages.title: Localized Spare Parts
advantages.description: Critical spares for PEIC-manufactured systems stocked domestically to reduce avoidable downtime.

advantages.title: MSME & NSIC Registered
advantages.description: MSME and NSIC registration support where applicable, with eligibility reviewed against each procurement requirement.

partners.title: Global & Domestic Partner Technologies
partners.description: Current associations with medical equipment brands across oncology, OT, imaging, dental, neonatal care, and specialty departments.
partners.advantages_subtitle: Specification support, installation, training, service coordination, and documentation through one PEIC relationship.

advantages.title: Technical Integration
advantages.description: Installation, calibration, application training, and validation support where required by the equipment type.

advantages.title: Unified Service Relationship
advantages.description: Coordinated AMC/CMC planning across PEIC-manufactured and supported partner equipment.

advantages.title: Pan-India Coordination
advantages.description: Service dispatch, technical queries, and parts coordination through PEIC engineers and partner engineer networks.

advantages.title: Single-Point Procurement
advantages.description: One PEIC contact manages specifications, quotations, and delivery coordination across represented categories.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: A CSSD-focused rectangular steam sterilizer for institutions that need repeatable cycles, load documentation, and enquiry-based configuration support.

detail.title: Horizontal rectangular sterilizers for CSSD-scale workflows.
detail.summary: Built for hospital sterile-processing departments where load handling, validated process control, and service ownership matter. PEIC can discuss chamber format, door workflow, documentation, and utility planning directly with your team.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: A rectangular horizontal format is useful when a facility needs broad chamber access, trolley-based loading, and predictable steam sterilization for institutional use. PEIC can share the detailed configuration after understanding the requirement.

highlights.title: CSSD-ready workflow
highlights.description: Designed around department-level loading, sterilization, exhaust, and drying workflows.

highlights.title: PC-based control options
highlights.description: Monitoring, programming, recording, and reporting can be aligned to the facility's documentation needs.

highlights.title: Automatic with manual backup
highlights.description: Routine process automation can be supported with manual override provisions for trained operators.

highlights.title: Custom build discussion
highlights.description: Materials, accessories, records, and site requirements can be reviewed before specifications are issued.

detail.cta_description: PEIC will recommend a suitable configuration and share detailed specifications privately after understanding your site and procurement context.
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures horizontal rectangular high-pressure steam sterilizers for CSSD and institutional sterilization workflows, with custom configuration support by enquiry.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Cylindrical High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: A cylindrical horizontal autoclave for hospitals and laboratories that need dependable pressure-steam sterilization with automated cycle control and domestic service support.

detail.title: Cylindrical high-pressure sterilizers for dependable institutional use.
detail.summary: A robust horizontal sterilizer format for facilities that want PEIC-built equipment, direct engineering accountability, controlled steam cycles, and detailed configuration guidance after enquiry.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: The cylindrical layout is a familiar autoclave format for hospitals, laboratories, and specialist departments. PEIC can configure controls, documentation, and accessories around how the equipment will actually be used.

highlights.title: Pressure-steam process control
highlights.description: Supports repeatable sterilization, exhaust, and drying workflows for institutional loads.

highlights.title: Automation and cycle records
highlights.description: PC-based monitoring and reporting options can support audit and process documentation.

highlights.title: Serviceable local build
highlights.description: PEIC keeps manufacturing, spares, and service coordination close to the installation.

highlights.title: Procurement-ready support
highlights.description: Detailed specifications are shared after the application, site, and tender context are reviewed.

detail.cta_title: Request a suitable horizontal autoclave configuration
detail.cta_description: Tell PEIC the department, load type, site location, and procurement stage, and the team will respond with configuration guidance.
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures horizontal cylindrical high-pressure steam sterilizers for hospitals, laboratories, CSSD support areas, and institutional sterilization rooms.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal High-Speed Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: A high-speed steam sterilizer for OT and sterile-processing teams that need faster instrument turnaround with controlled automation, cycle visibility, and service accountability.

detail.title: High-speed sterilizers for faster instrument turnaround.
detail.summary: Designed for departments where sterilization speed and process assurance both matter. PEIC can help evaluate whether a high-speed unit is appropriate for the instrument mix, operating rhythm, and documentation expectations.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: High-speed steam sterilizers support faster turnaround workflows for selected instruments and clinical departments. PEIC first confirms the intended use, then shares cycle and configuration guidance.

highlights.title: Turnaround-focused design
highlights.description: Built for workflows where selected loads need a faster sterilization path.

highlights.title: Controlled exhaust and drying
highlights.description: Cycle phases can be configured to support the load type and department requirement.

highlights.title: PC-based visibility
highlights.description: Live process display, records, and reporting options can be provided for traceability.

highlights.title: Application-led recommendation
highlights.description: PEIC reviews the intended use before sharing detailed specifications.

detail.cta_description: Share your turnaround requirement and PEIC will advise whether this category fits your department workflow.
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures high-speed steam sterilizers for OT support, CSSD fast-turnaround workflows, and instrument reprocessing departments.

manufactured_products.name: Fully Automatic Vertical Autoclave
manufactured_products.description: A compact vertical autoclave for labs, clinics, and smaller departments that need automated sterilization controls in a space-conscious footprint.

detail.title: Vertical autoclaves for compact, dependable sterilization.
detail.summary: A space-efficient PEIC autoclave category for facilities that need automatic control, straightforward operation, and reliable service support without a full CSSD-scale footprint.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: Vertical autoclaves are useful for laboratories, clinics, and smaller sterile-processing areas. PEIC can discuss model selection, accessories, and installation needs after understanding the site.

highlights.title: Compact installation
highlights.description: A vertical footprint helps fit sterilization capability into smaller rooms and support areas.

highlights.title: Automatic controller
highlights.description: Programmable control options can support routine operation, timing, and process indication.

highlights.title: Operator-focused fittings
highlights.description: Pressure, temperature, water-level, and safety features can be configured for practical daily use.

highlights.title: Accessory options
highlights.description: Baskets and load-handling accessories can be discussed as part of the enquiry.

detail.cta_title: Find the right vertical autoclave fit
detail.cta_description: PEIC can recommend a suitable vertical autoclave after reviewing your use case, room constraints, and procurement timeline.
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures fully automatic vertical autoclaves for laboratories, clinics, outpatient facilities, and compact sterile-processing needs.

manufactured_products.name: Bowl & Utensil Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: A stainless-steel sterilizer for OT, ward, and patient-care utensil workflows where infection-control support is needed outside the main CSSD.

detail.title: Bowl and utensil sterilizers for practical infection-control workflows.
detail.summary: A dedicated PEIC-built unit for departments that need to process bowls, utensils, trays, and similar patient-care items with simple operation and stainless-steel cleanability.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: This category supports ward, ICU, OT, and procedure-area workflows where utensils need a dedicated sterilization process. PEIC can configure the unit and accessories around the way the department handles daily loads.

highlights.title: Dedicated utensil workflow
highlights.description: Keeps patient-care item processing separate from larger CSSD equipment when appropriate.

highlights.title: Stainless-steel cleanability
highlights.description: Built around durable surfaces and fittings suited to healthcare cleaning routines.

highlights.title: Operator-friendly handling
highlights.description: Tray and lid arrangements can support practical loading and unloading.

highlights.title: Custom build available
highlights.description: Construction, fittings, and accessories can be discussed against department needs.

detail.cta_title: Discuss utensil sterilization for your department
detail.cta_description: Share your department workflow and PEIC will respond with a suitable configuration and private specification support.
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures bowl and utensil sterilizers for OT, ICU, ward, procedure-room, and patient-care support workflows.

manufactured_products.name: Fully Automatic Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: A fully automatic hot and cold water pressure sterilizer for departments that need controlled sterile-water handling, safety fittings, and serviceable stainless construction.

detail.title: Hot and cold water pressure sterilizers for controlled sterile-water supply.
detail.summary: A PEIC-built twin-shell category for facilities that need hot and cold sterile-water availability with automatic operation, safety fittings, and maintenance access considered from the start.
detail.brief_title: What this product is suited for
detail.brief: Hot and cold water pressure sterilizers support departments that need controlled sterile-water draw-off and reliable pressure-vessel operation. PEIC shares full technical details after reviewing the site and intended use.

highlights.title: Twin hot and cold workflow
highlights.description: Designed around controlled sterile-water availability from dedicated hot and cold sections.

highlights.title: Automatic operation options
highlights.description: Microprocessor or PLC-based control can be discussed for the operating workflow.

highlights.title: Serviceable construction
highlights.description: Maintenance access, drain points, filters, gauges, and fittings can be planned around use.

highlights.title: Site-specific recommendation
highlights.description: Capacity and utility details are handled privately after enquiry.

customization: Hot and cold water use pattern
detail.cta_title: Request hot and cold water sterilizer guidance
detail.cta_description: Tell PEIC your department use case and installation context, and the team will respond with a suitable private recommendation.
detail.seo_title: Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer | PEIC
detail.seo_description: PEIC manufactures fully automatic hot and cold water pressure sterilizers for controlled sterile-water workflows in healthcare facilities.

cta.label: Product Support
cta.title: Need specifications, a quotation, or a technical recommendation?
cta.description: Tell us the department, quantity, city, and intended use. PEIC will respond with relevant specifications and procurement guidance.
